标题: Top version Bottega Veneta BV 24/Autumn and Winter new round-toe snow boots with fur short boots. Highly popular on Instagram, with a high appearance rate in European and American street style. The round and chubby shoe shape is very flattering when worn, made of original imported glossy cow suede and suede material, very high quality. The insole is fully lined with imported sheepskin, with a 2cm thick layer of wool for comfort and warmth. Perfect for winter in the north. ✔️Material: Original cow suede ✔️Lining: Imported genuine sheepskin ✔️Outsole: Customized original anti-slip EVA outsole ✔️Outsole thickness: 4cm ✔️Size: #Women's sizes 35-40
